feed.title: Linguistic Typology
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Linguistic Typology (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Baniwa classifiers as predictors of upcoming nouns
entry.summary: Authors: Sandra Cronhamn, Anna Hjortdal, Franklin da Silva, Mikael Roll DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingty-2025-0026 Pages: Page range: 167-196

entry.title: A typology of the exophoric functions of Malayo-Polynesian demonstratives
entry.summary: Authors: Leah Pappas DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingty-2025-0009 Pages: Page range: 197-243

entry.title: The over-representation of phonological features in basic vocabulary doesn’t replicate when controlling for spatial and phylogenetic effects
entry.summary: Authors: Frederic Blum DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingty-2025-0050 Pages: Page range: 245-269

entry.title: The ubiquity of word-internal pauses
entry.summary: Authors: Ludger Paschen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingty-2024-0093 Pages: Page range: 271-320

entry.title: Beyond mutual exclusion: evolutionary pathways of classifiers and number marking
entry.summary: Authors: Enock Appiah Tieku DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingty-2024-0035 Pages: Page range: 321-349

entry.title: Languages in prehistory: approaching the unknown
entry.summary: Authors: Janhunen Juha DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingty-2025-0098 Pages: Page range: 351-360

entry.title: A grammar of Ngardi
entry.summary: Authors: Claire Bowern [klεə bowṇ] DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingty-2026-0037 Pages: Page range: 361-374
